examples: Immediately after the betrothal came the marriage, for there was no reason to delay.
The sound betrothal gifts and enough love, the marriage will have a wonderful start.
Most parts of China hold the tradition of the bridegroom giving betrothal gifts to the bride's family.
From the time of his betrothal to Mary until the finding of the twelve-year-old Jesus in the Temple of Jerusalem, he is there at every moment with loving care.
